goal: Design a mobile app path for this repository that prioritizes fast batch photo upload from a phone into the existing album and story system.
deliverable: Frozen requirement document and execution plan for a self-use mobile uploader app.
constraints: User wants a self-only mobile app
Phase 1 must prioritize fast batch upload from system gallery
Uploads should default to recently used targets with override support
One batch may attach to zero or more albums and zero or more stories
Failures should auto-retry and unfinished work should continue after app restart
Current backend supports only single-file uploads and no true chunk resumability
acceptanceCriteria: Can select multiple photos from mobile gallery
Can upload into existing album/story system
Retries and duplicate protection are defined
inferredAssumptions: Flutter is preferred over Tauri for this mobile reliability-focused use case
Task-level recovery is acceptable for phase 1 if user intent of 'continue later' is preserved
Backend changes should be minimal and directly tied to mobile upload reliability
